---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A short description of the feature you're proposing.

## Motivation

What problem does this solve? What attack vector does it cover?

## Proposed solution

Describe the change you'd like to see. Include:
- Which file(s) would change (`guard.py`, `SKILL.md`, etc.)
- Any new commands or API changes
- Expected detector behaviour / output format

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional context

Links, examples, attack samples, or anything else relevant.
